% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for sinr_threshold_sweep
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyOne\else\newif\ifShowStrategyOne\ShowStrategyOnetrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyTwo\else\newif\ifShowStrategyTwo\ShowStrategyTwotrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyThree\else\newif\ifShowStrategyThree\ShowStrategyThreetrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyFour\else\newif\ifShowStrategyFour\ShowStrategyFourtrue\fi
\ifdefined\ifShowStrategyFive\else\newif\ifShowStrategyFive\ShowStrategyFivetrue\fi
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.58\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={SINR threshold [dB]},
    ylabel={Fraction of user snapshots below threshold},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
    ymin=0.00000000,
    ymax=1.00000000,
  ]
    \ifShowStrategyOne
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=CentralMassiveMimoColor, solid] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy1}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyTwo
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor, solid] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy2}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyThree
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, solid] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy3}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFour
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, solid] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy4}
    \fi
    \ifShowStrategyFive
    \addplot[no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, solid] table[x=threshold_db,y=outage_fraction,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/sinr_threshold_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{\strategy5}
    \fi
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
